Validation Rules: Values: cut (precise start-end range, default), extract (remove head/tail by duration), cut_no_accurate (cut without -accurate_seek), extract_no_accurate (extract without -accurate_seek). v2.2.3: default changed from extract to cut, added _no_accurate variants
Format: 'H:MM:SS.mmm'. UI uses 4 separate number inputs (H, MM, SS, ms). Leave empty to skip. Range: H(0-99), MM(0-59), SS(0-59), ms(0-999) auto-clamped (v2.2.3)
